title: 1972 Operation LINEBACKER II
pages_or_sections: main text; lines 52-58 in tool view
strengths: Official concise statement of campaign dates, objectives, and target areas in Hanoi and Haiphong.
limitations: Does not provide local casualty or denominator data for the bounded Kham Thien episode.

title: Monument honours victims of American bombing
pages_or_sections: main text; line 24 and nearby lines in tool view
strengths: Provides the critical same-episode local resident denominator and reports 287 civilians killed, 290 severely wounded, and 30,000 residents in the ward.
limitations: Retrospective commemorative reporting rather than a contemporaneous administrative record.
notes: Best source for the bounded Kham Thien episode.

title: Hanoi commemorates victims, martyrs in US's 1972 airstrike
pages_or_sections: main text; lines 27-31 in tool view
strengths: Corroborates the 26 December Kham Thien strike and provides an alternate fatality count of 278, including 91 women and 55 children.
limitations: Retrospective commemorative source and not perfectly aligned with the 287-fatality article.
notes: Used to bound uncertainty around the civilian death count and to recover a women-deaths supporting metric.

title: Kham Thien's 12 days and nights of memory
strengths: Detailed commemorative feature with the most commonly repeated Kham Thien fatality figure in the recovered source set.
limitations: Still a memorial source and does not define whether 'women' overlaps with the elderly category.
notes: Nhan Dan reports 283 lives lost, including 91 women, 40 elderly, and 55 children.

title: Vietnam - Population structure 1972
strengths: Provides a usable historical under-15 population share for Vietnam in 1972.
limitations: National rather than Hanoi-specific, and the URL is a historical table view rather than a dedicated 1972 page.
notes: The historical table gives the 0-14 share for Vietnam in 1972 as 42.42%.
